name: Infinite Credit Card

domestic: 16 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year (max 4 per quarter).

milestones.label: 800 Reward Points (worth ₹800) credited free every month

additionalBenefits: Personalized card design featuring a handcrafted illustration of the cardholder
2 complimentary rounds of golf per month, plus 2 complimentary guest rounds per quarter
Premium concierge assistance (hotel/dining bookings, travel ticketing, event planning)
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹400 and ₹4,000 (max ₹4,500 per calendar year)
additionalDetails: Reward Points can be redeemed for brand e-vouchers or travel bookings via the Kotak Rewards portal at a rate of 1 Reward Point = ₹1.0.
Reward Points can also be redeemed as statement credit (cashback) at a rate of 1 Reward Point = ₹0.70.
A minimum of 2,000 Reward Points is required for statement credit (cashback) redemptions, and a minimum of 300 Reward Points is required for vouchers.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via Kotak Rewards

salaried: Exclusively for Kotak Wealth Management Banking Relationship clients
selfEmployed: Exclusively for Kotak Wealth Management Banking Relationship clients

internalNotes: Invite-only credit card for Wealth Management clients. Every 1 Reward Point converts to 2 Air Miles for partner travel redemptions. Cashback redemption value is devalued to ₹0.70 per point. Foreign markup fee is reduced to 2%. A 2% DCC fee applies for international transactions. Spends on wallet, fuel, rent, insurance, utilities, education, government, and gaming do not earn reward points.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
